data.name: Error_ActuatorOrBaseActuatorParamNotFoundInDb
data.value: Actuator or base actuator param not found in DB: {0}. Default value is used.

data.name: Error_MultipleActuatorParamsFoundInDb
data.value: Multiple actuator params found in DB: {0}

data.name: Error_MultipleBaseActuatorParamsFoundInDb
data.value: Multiple base actuator params found in DB: {0}

data.name: Error_MultipleMathOperators
data.value: Multiple math operators: {0}. Part will be ignored.

data.name: Error_TagConditionNotFoundInDb
data.value: TAG condition not found in DB.

data.name: ImportSerializationRootObject_Error_NoBaseActuator
data.value: BaseActuator is not found in file or DB, Identifier: {0}

data.name: Error_ImportSerializationRootObject_BaseActuatorWithUnversionedChangesExists
data.value: BaseActuator with unversioned changes exists. BaseActuator from file is skipped.

data.name: Error_ImportSerializationRootObject_CeMatrixWithUnversionedChangesExists
data.value: CE Matrix with unversioned changes exists. CE Matrix from file is skipped.

data.name: Error_ImportSerializationRootObject_DbFileReferenceWithUnversionedChangesExists
data.value: DbFile with unversioned changes exists. DbFile from file is skipped.

data.name: Error_ImportSerializationRootObject_ParamWithUnversionedChangesExists
data.value: Param with unversioned changes exists. Value is overwritten.

data.name: Error_ImportSerializationRootObject_SafetyControllerWithUnversionedChangesExists
data.value: SafetyController with unversioned changes exists. SafetyController from file is skipped.

data.name: Error_ImportSerializationRootObject_TagConditionWithUnversionedChangesExists
data.value: TagCondition with unversioned changes exists. TagCondition from file is skipped.

data.name: Error_ImportSerializationRootObject_TagWithUnversionedChangesExists
data.value: Tag with unversioned changes exists. Tag from file is skipped.

data.name: InvalidFileInPcArchive
data.value: Invalid file in archive. Must have .json or .csv or .xlsx extension and must have PazCheck standard format.

data.name: Error_IdentifierObjectDoesNotExist
data.value: <- Entity with this identifier does not exist.

data.name: Error_ImportSerializationRootObject_LegendWithUnversionedChangesExists
data.value: Legend with unversioned changes exists. Legend from file is skipped.

data.name: Error_MultipleTagConditionsFoundInDb
data.value: Tag already has condition with this identifier.

data.name: Error_TagConditionSymbolToDisplayAlreadySet
data.value: There is conflict of tag condition symbols in DB. {0}

data.name: Error_DuplicateTagCondition
data.value: Tag already have tag condition with this attributes set ({0}, {1}, {2})

data.name: RoleAttributesChanged_EventDesc
data.value: Role permission changed: {0}. Permission to business function: {1}; new value: {2}.

data.name: SupervisorApproveActiveProjectVersion_Event
data.value: Supervisor approve new active project version

data.name: Error_MultiplePcObjectsFoundInDb
data.value: Multiple monitoring objects found in DB: {0}

data.name: Error_PcObjectNotFoundInDb
data.value: Monitoring Object not found in DB.

data.name: Error_AeNotMapped_IncorrectMappingExpression
data.value: Incorrect expression. Must have 2 or 5 parts, separated by ':' <ConditionCategory>:<AeCondition> or <ConditionCategory>:<AeCondition>:<DaCondition>:<CanBeCause>:<CanBeEffect>

data.name: ParamDesc_LogicActuationTime
data.value: Actuation time (CE Matrix logic command, seconds)

data.name: ExportResultToFile_Event
data.value: Saving logs analysis results to file

data.name: ExportResultToFile_EventDesc
data.value: Saving logs analysis results to file

data.name: ParamDesc_FaultTriggered
data.value: Must not triggered, but actually triggered

data.name: TemplateTagsLooped
data.value: Tags templates looped or tags teplates chain too long

data.name: SeeUserEventsLog
data.value: For details, please see user events log.

data.name: RemoteFileIsNotImported_EventDesc
data.value: Unit events are not recieved from server

data.name: RemoteFileIsNotImported_EventName
data.value: Unit events are not recieved from server

data.name: InformationSecurityEvents_WarningRecordsCount_EventDesc
data.value: DB records count warning - Information Security Events

data.name: InformationSecurityEvents_WarningRecordsCount_EventName
data.value: DB records count warning - Information Security Events

data.name: UnitEvents_WarningRecordsCount_EventDesc
data.value: DB records count warning - Unit Events (Diagnost module)

data.name: UnitEvents_WarningRecordsCount_EventName
data.value: DB records count warning - Unit Events (Diagnost module)

data.name: UserEvents_WarningRecordsCount_EventDesc
data.value: DB records count warning - User Events

data.name: UserEvents_WarningRecordsCount_EventName
data.value: DB records count warning - User Events

data.name: ParamDesc_ValueEU
data.value: Data Access Item ID or Const for Value Eng. Units

data.name: ParamDesc_ValueMax
data.value: Data Access Item ID or Const for Value Max

data.name: ParamDesc_ValueMin
data.value: Data Access Item ID or Const for Value Min

data.name: InvalidDaCondition
data.value: DA differs in this events category. TAG: {0}; DA: {1}

data.name: ImportEventsJournalFileFinished
data.value: Import events journal file finished; elapsed milliseconds: {0}

data.name: ParamDesc_TrendSources
data.value: Value Sources: Data Access Item ID(s) and JSON Query(-ies) (separator: ---)

data.name: SetCurrentProjectVersion_EventDesc
data.value: Set current project version. Version {1} has taken from project '{0}' and is set as current in project '{2}'. Details: {3}

data.name: DestinationTypeDesc_ExportMonitoringEventsReport_HumanReadable_ExcelFile_Details
data.value: Filtered events list, human-readable .xlsx file (spreadsheet file). Not intended for subsequent import.

data.name: DestinationTypeDesc_ExportMonitoringWidgetsReport_HumanReadable_ExcelFile_Details
data.value: Safety index report, human-readable .xlsx file (spreadsheet file). Not intended for subsequent import.

data.name: DestinationTypeDesc_Std_File_Details
data.value: PazCheck standard files, .zip archive with .json, .csv files. Full export of objects, including attached files. Not intended for human viewing. Intended for subsequent import.

data.name: DestinationTypeDesc_Std_ExcelFile_Details
data.value: Standard Excel files, .xlsx files (spreadsheet files). Incomplete export of objects, does not include attached files. Possible to import back into PAZ-Check.

data.name: DestinationTypeDesc_Std_ExcelFile_Extended_Details
data.value: Standard Excel files, .xlsx file (spreadsheet file). Incomplete export of objects, does not include attached files. Can be imported into PAZ-Check. Characterized by a sparse data format.

data.name: DestinationTypeDesc_HumanReadable_ExcelFile_Details
data.value: Human-readable file, .xlsx file (spreadsheet file). Not intended for subsequent import.

data.name: Error_SeeApplicationLogFilesForDetails
data.value: Error. See application log files for details.

data.name: Error_FileNotFound
data.value: File not found or not accessible.

data.name: Error_CauseInHeaderArea
data.value: Cause cannot be in upper area.

data.name: Error_EffectInHeaderArea
data.value: Effect cannot be in left area.

data.name: Error_IncorrectAreaForDash
data.value: '-' can be only in left or central areas.

data.name: Error_IncorrectAreaForDoubleDash
data.value: '--' can be only in upper area.

data.name: ParamDesc_TagIsVariable
data.value: Tag is variable for CE Matrices relations
